worlds.name: Gravity
worlds.description: 1/r attractive force in a 2D world. The Green's function of the 2D Laplacian.

worlds.name: Yukawa
worlds.description: Short-range exponentially suppressed force with screening length λ.

worlds.name: Hubble flow
worlds.description: Central log potential plus a position-dependent radial Hubble flow H(r).

worlds.name: Ether
worlds.description: Central law plus a global preferred-direction drift, like a luminiferous ether.

worlds.name: Oscillator
worlds.description: Sinusoidally varying coupling that periodically reverses sign.

worlds.name: Circle
worlds.description: Fractional Laplacian with 1 center + 10 ring particles, all sourcing the field.

worlds.name: Extra dimensions
worlds.description: 1/r to 1/r² transition (2d+1 dimensions) with Kaluza-Klein image sums.

worlds.name: Fractional
worlds.description: Fractional Laplacian acting on a two-particle system.

worlds.name: Dark matter
worlds.description: 20 visible + 10 hidden dark sources. The agent sees only the 25 visible particles.

worlds.name: Three species
worlds.description: 30 background particles in three hidden species (one repulsive) plus 5 neutral probes.

worlds.name: Coulomb
worlds.description: 1/r² attractive force. Two-particle setup with both p₁ and p₂ acting as charges.
